response.justification: Bogdan has extensive backend and distributed systems experience, including real-time data processing and microservices, which aligns well with the fintech and agentic AI requirements. However, his direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in production is limited to MCP and developer tooling rather than financial or operational agentic workflows. His fintech exposure is minimal, and he lacks demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering teams to 30+ members or governance of hybrid engineering models. His strengths lie in software craftsmanship and system reliability, but regulatory compliance and financial-domain depth are significant gaps.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise with real-time data processing and microservices
Experience with event-driven architectures and Kubernetes deployments
Proven track record in high-performance, low-latency systems and software craftsmanship
concerns: Limited direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in production, especially in fintech contexts
No demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or governance of hybrid models
Minimal exposure to fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance) or regulatory compliance
